title: Matter-Energy Converter
brief:
Decompose matter into quark particles, convert them into string fields, and then extract them as energy! A great helper for resource recycling!
The Matter-Energy Converter is here!

Another technological gem of the archotech world, capable of decomposing matter into quark particles, converting them into string fields, and then extracting them as energy!
Whether it's food, medicine, buildings, or materials, this magical machine can easily decompose them all! Your colony will never lack energy again!

Archotech technology says, let there be light!
description:
There are three recycling methods :
* Set the storage area settings, like a storage building, the villain will be automatically moved in, and then click the convert storage button, all items on the building will be decomposed and converted.
* Use the loading button of the airdrop bin to load items like loading the airdrop bin, and then click the convert load button, and the items in the cargo bay will be decomposed and converted.
* Directly click the fixed-point conversion button, and then use the cross cursor to point the item or building that needs to be converted, and it will be decomposed and converted immediately.

Tip: The storage area of ​​the material energy converter will not age and the decay level will be constantly reset, so it can be used as a special warehouse to temporarily store items.
